summary: Seller home shell replaces legacy creator-matching seller entry with stage-routed workflow UI, persisted persona switcher, Vietnamese copy, and integration tests for routing. Phone-OTP auth unchanged.

interfaceChanges.description: Primary seller entry: workflow breadcrumb, shop summary, task queue from mock persona.
Header control to switch new/leakage/growth demo personas with localStorage persistence.
Maps mock persona profile through stage router to workflow entry metadata.
Client context for persisted demo persona selection.

mappings.criterion: Post-login seller lands in home shell (not legacy recommendation feed)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_home_shell.test.tsx::lands seller in home shell instead of legacy recommendation feed

mappings.criterion: Persona switcher loads mock personas and re-routes on change
Stage router selects workflow; UI shows which workflow is active
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_home_shell.test.tsx::shows active workflow label from stage router

mappings.criterion: Vietnamese copy, VND formatting, responsive mobile layout
Integration test: switching persona changes visible workflow/stage
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_home_shell.test.tsx::integration: switching persona changes visible workflow and stage

mappings.criterion: Integration test: new/leakage/growth personas route to expected workflow entry
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_home_shell.test.tsx::integration: leakage persona routes to expected workflow entry

mappings.criterion: Verifies OTP and stores session (phone-OTP auth flow unchanged)
